title: allantodia metcalfii
intro: Allantodia metcalfii, also known as Metcalf's Allantodia, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allantodia metcalfii include potential relief from pain, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as anti-aging and immune system support. Allantodia metcalfii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
